_publications._publicationTitle: Discovery of a small molecule targeting IRA2 deletion in budding yeast and neurofibromin loss in malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: Strains with a nab3-11 allele grew at 27° and failed at 30°, while an ira2Δ nab3-11 strains grew poorly at 27°
details: ira2Δ nab3-11 double mutant showed synthetic lethality with poor growth at 27°C compared to single mutants
